name: No-Bake Peanut Butter-Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine sugar, cocoa powder, milk, and butter.
2. Heat the mixture over medium heat until it reaches boiling point.
3. Remove from heat and stir in salt, vanilla extract, crunchy peanut butter, rolled oats, and coconut flakes.
4. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto waxed paper.
5. Allow to cool completely before serving.
